mapper.select: select * from refresh_tokens where token_hash = #{tokenHash} and revoked = 0
select * from refresh_tokens where token_hash = #{tokenHash} and user_id = #{userId} and revoked = 0
mapper.update: update refresh_tokens set revoked = 1 where token_hash = #{tokenHash}
update refresh_tokens set revoked = 1 where token_hash = #{tokenHash} and user_id = #{userId}
update refresh_tokens set revoked = 1 where user_id = #{userId}
update refresh_tokens set last_used_at = now() where id = #{id}
